query:
CREATE TABLE `jobPhotos` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `jobId` int NOT NULL,
  `s3Key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `s3Url` text NOT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(255),
  `mimeType` varchar(64),
  `sizeBytes` int,
  `uploadedByUserId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `jobPhotos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `jobId` int NOT NULL,
  `s3Key` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `s3Url` text NOT NULL,
  `filename` varchar(255),
  `mimeType` varchar(64),
  `sizeBytes` int,
  `uploadedByUserId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `jobPhotos_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
